fa-square-y.appearanceId: square containing the bold uppercase letter Y
fa-square-y.functionalityId: select or label category Y item
fa-square-y.intentId: identify or navigate to Y-labeled option

fa-square-z.appearanceId: square containing the bold uppercase letter Z
fa-square-z.functionalityId: select or label category Z item
fa-square-z.intentId: identify or navigate to Z-labeled option

fa-star.functionalityId: mark or rate an item as favorite
fa-star.intentId: save or highlight a preferred item

fa-star-half.appearanceId: five-pointed star with left half filled and right half empty
fa-star-half.intentId: represent a partial or mid-point rating

fa-stethoscope.appearanceId: stethoscope with circular chest piece and two earpieces
fa-stethoscope.functionalityId: access medical or health check features
fa-stethoscope.intentId: indicate a doctor visit or health assessment

fa-stop.functionalityId: stop or halt media or process playback
fa-stop.intentId: end an ongoing action or recording

fa-store.appearanceId: storefront with awning overhang and display window
fa-store.functionalityId: browse or open an online or physical store
fa-store.intentId: visit a shop or marketplace listing

fa-store-lock.appearanceId: storefront with awning and padlock overlay badge
fa-store-lock.functionalityId: indicate a locked or closed store
fa-store-lock.intentId: show that a shop is restricted or unavailable

fa-store-slash.appearanceId: storefront with awning and diagonal slash crossing it
fa-store-slash.functionalityId: indicate a disabled or removed store
fa-store-slash.intentId: show that a shop is closed or deactivated

fa-strikethrough.appearanceId: text letter S with a horizontal line crossing through its middle
fa-strikethrough.functionalityId: apply strikethrough formatting to selected text
fa-strikethrough.intentId: mark text as deleted or no longer valid

fa-stroopwafel.appearanceId: round waffle wafer with a grid of diamond-shaped indentations
fa-stroopwafel.functionalityId: browse Dutch snack or food-themed content
fa-stroopwafel.intentId: indicate a stroopwafel or waffle cookie item

fa-sun.appearanceId: circle with radiating pointed rays around perimeter
fa-sun.functionalityId: toggle light mode or display brightness
fa-sun.intentId: switch to daytime or bright theme

fa-sun-alt.appearanceId: circle with alternating long and short radiating rays around perimeter
fa-sun-alt.functionalityId: toggle alternate light mode or brightness setting
fa-sun-alt.intentId: adjust display to an alternate bright theme

fa-sun-cloud.appearanceId: sun shape partially obscured behind a cloud
fa-sun-cloud.intentId: check or show a partly sunny forecast

fa-sun-dust.appearanceId: sun shape with small drifting dust particles below it
fa-sun-dust.functionalityId: indicate dusty or hazy sunny weather conditions
fa-sun-dust.intentId: check or warn about dust and sun exposure

fa-sun-haze.appearanceId: sun shape with horizontal haze lines radiating outward below it
fa-sun-haze.functionalityId: indicate hazy or smoky sunny conditions
fa-sun-haze.intentId: check or warn about sun haze or air quality

fa-sun-plant-wilt.appearanceId: sun shape above a drooping wilted plant in a pot
fa-sun-plant-wilt.functionalityId: indicate drought or heat stress on plants
fa-sun-plant-wilt.intentId: warn about extreme heat or water shortage

fa-synagogue.appearanceId: building facade with arched windows, Star of David, and twin towers
fa-synagogue.functionalityId: browse or locate a synagogue or Jewish place of worship
fa-synagogue.intentId: find a nearby Jewish religious site

fa-table-tree.appearanceId: table grid with left column showing an indented tree hierarchy
fa-table-tree.functionalityId: view data in a hierarchical tree table layout
fa-table-tree.intentId: browse nested or grouped tabular data

fa-tag.appearanceId: price tag shape with a small hole at the left end
fa-tag.functionalityId: add or view a label or tag on an item
fa-tag.intentId: categorize or price-mark a piece of content

fa-tags.appearanceId: two overlapping price tag shapes with holes at left ends
fa-tags.functionalityId: add or manage multiple labels on an item

fa-tally-1.functionalityId: record or display a count of one
fa-tally-1.intentId: tally or track a single unit

fa-tally-2.appearanceId: two vertical tally marks in a row
fa-tally-2.functionalityId: record or display a count of two

fa-tally-3.appearanceId: three vertical tally marks in a row
fa-tally-3.functionalityId: record or display a count of three

fa-tally-4.appearanceId: four vertical tally marks in a row
fa-tally-4.functionalityId: record or display a count of four

fa-taxi-bus.appearanceId: side-view vehicle combining taxi and bus body with large windows
fa-taxi-bus.functionalityId: book or view taxi-bus transit options
fa-taxi-bus.intentId: arrange shared or hybrid taxi-bus transport

fa-temperature-0.functionalityId: indicate freezing or zero temperature level
fa-temperature-0.intentId: show that temperature or fill level is empty

fa-temperature-1.appearanceId: thermometer with fill at one-fifth level
fa-temperature-1.functionalityId: indicate very low temperature or level
fa-temperature-1.intentId: show temperature or capacity is nearly empty

fa-temperature-2.appearanceId: thermometer with fill at two-fifths level
fa-temperature-2.intentId: show temperature or capacity is below midpoint

fa-temperature-3.appearanceId: thermometer with fill at three-fifths level
fa-temperature-3.intentId: show temperature or capacity is above midpoint

fa-temperature-4.functionalityId: indicate maximum or high temperature level
fa-temperature-4.intentId: show temperature or capacity is at full level

fa-temperature-snow.appearanceId: thermometer with a snowflake symbol beside it
fa-temperature-snow.intentId: check or warn about cold or icy conditions

fa-tent-arrow-down-to-line.appearanceId: tent shape with a downward arrow pointing to a horizontal line below it
fa-tent-arrow-down-to-line.functionalityId: anchor or assign a tent to a ground line
fa-tent-arrow-down-to-line.intentId: set up or place a tent at a designated site

fa-tent-arrow-left-right.appearanceId: tent shape with left and right arrows on either side
fa-tent-arrow-left-right.functionalityId: move or resize a tent location horizontally
fa-tent-arrow-left-right.intentId: adjust or reposition a tent space left or right

fa-tent-arrow-turn-left.appearanceId: tent shape with a curved arrow turning to the left
fa-tent-arrow-turn-left.functionalityId: redirect or reroute away from a tent area
fa-tent-arrow-turn-left.intentId: indicate a detour or change of direction near a tent

fa-terminal.appearanceId: command prompt with angle bracket and cursor line
fa-terminal.functionalityId: open a command line or terminal window
fa-terminal.intentId: run commands or scripts in a terminal

fa-ticket-plane.appearanceId: single boarding pass ticket with small airplane silhouette on it
fa-ticket-plane.functionalityId: view or manage a flight boarding pass
fa-ticket-plane.intentId: access or retrieve an airplane ticket

fa-tickets-plane.appearanceId: two overlapping boarding pass tickets with airplane silhouettes on them
fa-tickets-plane.functionalityId: view or manage multiple flight tickets
fa-tickets-plane.intentId: access or book several airplane tickets

fa-timeline.appearanceId: horizontal line with vertical tick marks and dots
fa-timeline.functionalityId: view or navigate a chronological timeline
fa-timeline.intentId: browse events or milestones in order

fa-timeline-arrow.appearanceId: horizontal line with vertical tick marks, dots, and an arrowhead at the right end
fa-timeline-arrow.intentId: follow or advance through ordered events

fa-toolbox.appearanceId: rectangular tool box with a top handle and hinged lid
fa-toolbox.functionalityId: open a set of tools or utility options

fa-tornado.functionalityId: display tornado or severe storm warning
fa-tornado.intentId: warn about or check tornado weather conditions

fa-tractor.appearanceId: side-view farm tractor with large rear wheel and small front wheel
fa-tractor.intentId: select or manage farm vehicle or field work

fa-train.appearanceId: side-view train locomotive with wheels, cab window, and front bumper
fa-train.functionalityId: browse train routes or rail transit options
fa-train.intentId: find or book a train journey

fa-train-track.appearanceId: two parallel horizontal rails connected by evenly spaced crossties
fa-train-track.functionalityId: view or manage a rail track or route segment
fa-train-track.intentId: navigate or plan a rail infrastructure path
